title: Candidate Disengaged
content: Candidate has not responded to last two outreach attempts. Marcus showed strong interest initially but has gone quiet during final staging.

title: Competing Offer Received
content: Alice disclosed that she received a competing offer from a rival firm. It offers a higher salary of 155,000 and remote work options.

title: Strong Interview Performance
content: Candidate did an amazing job on the technical system design round. Aced all coding exercises. Strong fit for the team.

title: Salary Negotiation Request
content: Alice emailed asking if there is flexibility to increase the starting base salary to match her competitive offer expectation of 150k.

title: Urgent Hiring Need
content: Our Senior ML engineer resigned today. We have an urgent hiring need to backfill this position as soon as possible.
